title: Update app title and redesign VTH avatar branding across all pages

requirements.summary: Update the main app title from 'VTH: Guest Book' to 'VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker' everywhere it appears
acceptanceCriteria: The header in AppLayout.tsx shows 'VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker'
The AboutDialog.tsx modal title reads 'VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker'
The HTML <title> tag in index.html reads 'VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker'
No instance of the old title 'VTH: Guest Book' remains anywhere in the UI
All dialogs (HowToUse, CreateAccount, About) reflect the updated title where applicable

file_operations.description: Update the <title> tag from 'VTH: Guest Book' to 'VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker' to reflect the new app branding in the browser tab.
Update the header text from 'VTH: Guest Book' to 'VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker' to display the new title in the sticky header across all pages.
Update the dialog title and any references to the app name from 'VTH: Guest Book' to 'VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker' in the About modal content.
Update any references to the app name from 'VTH: Guest Book' to 'VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker' in the usage instructions dialog.
Update any references to the app name from 'VTH: Guest Book' to 'VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker' in the account creation/login dialog content.

requirements.summary: Redesign the VTH avatar/logo to prominently accentuate the 'VTH' initials with outdoor-themed styling
acceptanceCriteria: The new avatar prominently displays 'VTH' as the primary visual element
The avatar is rendered in the sticky header in AppLayout.tsx
The avatar is rendered inside the AboutDialog.tsx modal
The avatar uses the new generated image asset from frontend/public/assets/generated
The avatar style is consistent across all locations it appears

file_operations.description: Replace the existing VTH logo image source with the new generated avatar frontend/public/assets/generated/vth-avatar.dim_256x256.png in the sticky header. Update the img src attribute and ensure the alt text describes the new VTH initials-focused design.

Replace the existing VTH logo image source with the new generated avatar frontend/public/assets/generated/vth-avatar.dim_256x256.png in the About dialog. Update the img src attribute and ensure the alt text describes the new VTH initials-focused design.
